problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: Combining Shape memory alloy phase transition with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
